name: @htmlwasher/native
description: napi-rs v3 binding around the htmlwasher-native Rust extraction core (boilerplate removal + page-type classifier). Consumed only by the htmlwasher pipeline.

scripts.build: node -e "if (!process.env.CARGO_HOME && !process.env.npm_config_rebuild_native) { console.log('@htmlwasher/native: skipping build (committed prebuilds present; set CARGO_HOME or npm_config_rebuild_native=1 to rebuild).'); process.exit(0); } require('child_process').execSync('napi build --platform --release --features napi', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.test: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); if (process.env.CARGO_HOME || process.env.npm_config_rebuild_native) { cp.execSync('cargo test --workspace', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } cp.execSync('vitest run', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
